title: DTE Energy announces its plan to improve electric reliability by over 60% in the next five years
text: Detailed roadmap for dramatically increasing reliability through a $9 billion investment will be submitted today to the Michigan Public Service Commission Detailed roadmap for dramatically increasing reliability through a $9 billion investment will be submitted today to the Michigan Public Service Commission

title: 7 Oversold Utilities Stocks to Snap Up Before Bond Yields Fall
text: It hasn't been a great year for finding the best utilities stocks to buy. It has been the sector laggard of the S&P 500 which has grown more swiftly than many expected.
